_meta.description: NPC rogues gallery. Each NPC has an id that matches speaker IDs in dialogue beats. Fill in the blanks — name, faction, personality, portrait file.
_meta.instructions: For each NPC you want to add: give them an id (used in dialogue files), a name, a faction, a short personality tag, and a portrait filename (when drawn). The system looks up portraits by npc_id in the portraits directory.
